poj: Lí sī ha̍k-seng á m̄ sī?
tl: Lí sī ha̍k-sing á m̄ sī?

english: roof covered with galvanized metal sheeting
say nothing to the point or purpose
Speak more clearly, don't be so obscure.
hanzi: 說清楚點，不要那麼曖昧。
poj: Kóng khah chheng-chhó lè, mài hiah ài-māi.
tl: Kóng khah tshing-tshó lè, mài hiah ài-māi.

english: I perspired very much today. I'm all smelly and dirty.
hanzi: 今天流很多汗，身體覺得很不舒服
poj: Kin-á-ji̍t lâu chin-chē kōaⁿ, seng-khu chin ak-chak.
tl: Kin-á-ji̍t lâu tsin-tsē kuānn, sing-khu tsin ak-tsak.

english: Don't go out and get wet in the rain.
You should be  quiet. You need to rest.
I don't fear an impetuous person, because an upright person is easily convinced.
hanzi: 急性的人我不怕，因為正直的人容易被說服。
poj: Kip-sèng ê lâng góa m̄-kiaⁿ, in-ūi âng-bīn-ê khoài lo̍h láng.
tl: Kip-sìng ê lâng guá m̄-kiann, in-uī âng-bīn-ê khuài lo̍h láng.

english: Your voice is nasal. Do you have a cold?
hanzi: 你講話塞鼻音，是著涼了嗎 ？
poj: Lí kóng-ōe àng-phīⁿ-siaⁿ, sī kôaⁿ-tio̍h á m̄-sī?
tl: Lí kóng-uē àng-phīnn-siann, sī kuânn-tio̍h á m̄-sī?

english: When the cat's away the mice will play.
hanzi: 家裏如無貓，老鼠就蹺腿。
poj: Ke-lāi nā bô bâ, niáu-chhí ē khiau-kha.
tl: Ke-lāi nā bô bâ, niáu-tshí ē khiau-kha.

english: I don't dare smoke in front of the principal.
hanzi: 不敢在校長的眼前吸煙。
poj: M̄-káⁿ tòa hāu-tiúⁿ ê ba̍k-chiu-chêng chia̍h hun.
tl: M̄-kánn tuà hāu-tiúnn ê ba̍k-tsiu-tsîng tsia̍h hun.

english: have not had the experience of
put closer together, hide it more secretly
Did you ever go to Taipei?
No, I have never been there.
Recently it looks like he is making money because he is wearing all new clothes.
hanzi: 近來有賺的樣子，穿得一身新衣服。
poj: Kīn-lâi chiám-jiân ū báu ê khoán, chhēng kah kui seng-khu sin-chhak-chhak.
tl: Kīn-lâi tsiám-jiân ū báu ê khuán, tshīng kah kui sing-khu sin-tshak-tshak.

english: Don't be tempted by an unvirtuous woman.
poj: Lí m̄-thang hō͘ pháiⁿ cha-bó͘ bê khì.
tl: Lí m̄-thang hōo pháinn tsa-bóo bê khì.

english: Cats do not watch the door, dogs do not catch rats.
hanzi: 貓不會看門，狗不會捉老鼠。
poj: Niau bē kò͘-mn̂g, káu bē kā niáu-chhí.
tl: Niau bē kòo-mn̂g, káu bē kā niáu-tshí.

poj: Lí ê thâu-khak ē thiàⁿ bē ?
tl: Lí ê thâu-khak ē thiànn bē ?

english: can't stand up, can't remain standing
excellent, lofty and intelligent (said to one who has attained a high position)
the palm of one hand cannot clap and make a sound, cannot do without assistance
Without your help, my applause would be difficult to hear.
hanzi: 若沒有你幫忙，我孤掌難鳴。
poj: Nā bô lí pang-bâng, góa ko͘-chióng lân bêng.
tl: Nā bô lí pang-bâng, guá koo-tsióng lân bîng.

english: In just a short while it will be very clear.
poj: Koh bô lōa kú chiū ē bêng-hián.
tl: Koh bô luā kú tsiū ē bîng-hián.

english: Your name was not on the list.
Speak more clearly. Write more clearly.
If you are unwilling to act, don't do it unwillingly.
poj: Nā bô goān-ì, m̄-bián bián-kióng chò.
tl: Nā bô guān-ì, m̄-bián bián-kióng tsò.

english: take off or tip a hat
There are no clues where to go to catch the criminal.
hanzi: 都無線索（頭緒）要從那兒去捕捉，做起？
poj: Lóng bô-cháng-thâu boeh toh-ūi khì lia̍h-cháng?
tl: Lóng bô-tsáng-thâu bueh toh-uī khì lia̍h-tsáng?

english: You are correct to say that.
Are you going this evening? That's right.
hanzi: 你今晚要去，是嗎？ 不錯。
poj: Lí eng-àm boeh khì, sī bô͘? Bô-chhò.
tl: Lí ing-àm bueh khì, sī bôo? Bô-tshò.

english: Old people don't have as much energy.
I have nothing to do with it.
A person has to continue breathing to continue to live.
hanzi: 人要不斷的呼吸才會活。
poj: Lâng ài bô làng-tn̄g ê chhoán-khùi chiah ē oa̍h.
tl: Lâng ài bô làng-tn̄g ê tshuán-khuì tsiah ē ua̍h.

english: repeatedly ask till he doesn't have an alibi left
watch movies until there is no heart to study
hanzi: 看電影看得無心情讀書。
poj: Khòaⁿ tiān-iáⁿ khòaⁿ kah bô sim-chiâⁿ thang tha̍k-chheh.
tl: Khuànn tiān-iánn khuànn kah bô sim-tsiânn thang tha̍k-tsheh.

english: When you are old, you can't make a living.
Man's desires can never be satisfied.
hanzi: 人的慾望永遠不能滿足。
poj: Lâng ê io̍k-bōng éng-oán bē-tàng boán-chiok.
tl: Lâng ê io̍k-bōng íng-uán bē-tàng buán-tsiok.

english: Recently business hasn't been too profitable.
hanzi: 近來生意難做（利薄，賺少）
poj: Kīn-lâi ê seng-lí chin boa̍t (boa̍t-lī, boa̍t-thàn).
tl: Kīn-lâi ê sing-lí tsin bua̍t (bua̍t-lī, bua̍t-thàn).

english: If you can't find a job, workers should do less meaningful work.
hanzi: 如找不著工作，工友也只好將就了。
poj: Nā chhōe bô thâu-lō͘, kang-iú iā tio̍h bóng-chò.
tl: Nā tshuē bô thâu-lōo, kang-iú iā tio̍h bóng-tsò.

english: You are very reckless, you don't eat three full meals a day but you are thinking of buying a television set.
hanzi: 你很糊塗，三餐不飽，還想要買電視。
poj: Lí chin bòng, saⁿ-tǹg chia̍h bē pá, iáu siūⁿ-boeh bé tiān-sī.
tl: Lí tsin bòng, sann-tǹg tsia̍h bē pá, iáu siūnn-bueh bé tiān-sī.

english: be exiled, wander in a strange land, fugitive
long for or crave for, as a thirsty man longs for water
People who are not handy get all mixed up when they have two or three tasks to do at the same time.
hanzi: 手腳慢的人，如果有一些事情，他就忙得不可開交了。
poj: Kha-chhiú bān ê lâng nā nn̄g-hāng-á khang-khoe i tō bū-sà-sà a.
tl: Kha-tshiú bān ê lâng nā nn̄g-hāng-á khang-khue i tō bū-sà-sà a.

english: Man needs both spiritual and material consolations.
hanzi: 人需要精神上和物質上的安慰。
poj: Lâng su-iàu cheng-sîn-siōng kap bu̍t-chit-siōng ê an-ùi.
tl: Lâng su-iàu tsing-sîn-siōng kap bu̍t-tsit-siōng ê an-uì.

english: It's chilly both in the morning and in the evening during winter.
Policemen went to the scene to investigate into the case.
If you eat things without discretion, some day you will get sick.
hanzi: 你如果要亂吃，早晚會生病。
poj: Lí nā boeh o͘-pe̍h chia̍h, chá-bān ē phòa-pēⁿ.
tl: Lí nā bueh oo-pe̍h tsia̍h, tsá-bān ē phuà-pēnn.

english: Five of the workers are regular employees, and two of them are temporary employees.
hanzi: 工人五個固定的，兩個臨時的。
poj: Kang-lâng gō͘ ê chāi-gia̍h-ê, nn̄g ê lîm-sî-ê.
tl: Kang-lâng gōo ê tsāi-gia̍h-ê, nn̄g ê lîm-sî-ê.

english: If you stand there, you will block the light.
hanzi: 你站在那兒，會遮住我的光線。
poj: Lí khiā tòa hia, ē kā góa cha̍h-àm.
tl: Lí khiā tuà hia, ē kā guá tsa̍h-àm.

english: relieve those who are suffering from calamity
You haven't that kind of talent, why do you want to do something like that?
hanzi: 你沒有那種才能，為什麼要做那種事？
poj: Lí bô hit khoán châi-lêng, àn-chóaⁿ boeh chò hit khoán tāi-chì?
tl: Lí bô hit khuán tsâi-lîng, àn-tsuánn bueh tsò hit khuán tāi-tsì?

english: don't know where the place is
What floor do you live on?
poj: Lí tòa tī tē kúi chàn?
tl: Lí tuà tī tē kuí tsàn?

english: kind of cake made of glutinous rice mixed with alkali as an antiseptic
When you cut rice you need a person to bundle the straw.
hanzi: 割稻的時候，要有一個捆草的。
poj: Koah tiū-á ê sî, ài ū chi̍t ê cháng-chháu ê.
tl: Kuah tiū-á ê sî, ài ū tsi̍t ê tsáng-tsháu ê.

english: very careful or cautious, prepared for whatever may come
The sections of sugar cane are very close.
You only get only a hurried glance at things if you go to the US for only two weeks.
hanzi: 去美國只玩兩個禮拜，像走馬看花似的。
poj: Khì Bí-kok chhit-thô nn̄g lé-pài niā-niā, chhin-chhiūⁿ teh cháu-bé khòaⁿ-hoe.
tl: Khì Bí-kok tshit-thô nn̄g lé-pài niā-niā, tshin-tshiūnn teh tsáu-bé khuànn-hue.

english: sacrifice by the road, before a funeral, offering of sacrifice by friends or admirers on the roadside along the way of a funeral procession
There are too many people to find a seat.
If anyone is doing evil, you should stop them.
hanzi: 如有人在做壞事，要制止他們。
poj: Nā ū lâng teh chò pháiⁿ tāi-chì, tio̍h kā in chè-chí.
tl: Nā ū lâng teh tsò pháinn tāi-tsì, tio̍h kā in tsè-tsí.

english: the sections or festivals of the year
Two persons or cars run into each another.
poj: Nn̄g ê lâng (nn̄g tâi khì-chhia) sio-cheng.
tl: Nn̄g ê lâng (nn̄g tâi khì-tshia) sio-tsing.

english: speak of the proper principle for settling a case
Chinese kale, a wrinkled leaf cabbage like vegetable
a vegetable with bulbous root like turnip, kohlrabi
cabbage, and its derivatives the cauliflower, Brussels sprouts, and kale
Are you a member of The Legion of Mary?
When you have time come over to the parish and look around.
hanzi: 你如有空的時候，來參觀我們的天主教堂。
poj: Lí nā ū êng ê sî, lâi goán ê Thian-Chú-kàu-tn̂g chham-koan.
tl: Lí nā ū îng ê sî, lâi guán ê Thian-Tsú-kàu-tn̂g tsham-kuan.

english: be associated or connected in business, so as to be involved in his responsibilities or losses
you cannot do it, don't put your hand in it.
not able to distinguish good and bad
be very much pleased with what one has done or achieved, smug
Don't be touching everything. (Look but don't touch.)
poj: Lí ê chhiú mài hiah chhàu-chiān.
tl: Lí ê tshiú mài hiah tshàu-tsiān.

english: You have been away or you come so seldom that you smell musty. (This expression is very often used between close friends or relatives.)
hanzi: 你很久沒來，變得陌生了。
poj: Lí chin kú bô lâi a, chhàu-phú khì a.
tl: Lí tsin kú bô lâi a, tshàu-phú khì a.

english: Sez you! You're full of hot air. (vulgar expression, Lit. You're just breaking wind.)
If you keep it too long, it will become sour.
poj: Nā khǹg siuⁿ kú, ē chhàu-sng (khì).
tl: Nā khǹg siunn kú, ē tshàu-sng (khì).

english: talk and talk over again till we are tired of hearing them.

hanzi: 不要吵架，大家有話好說。

english: If there is anything which I don't know, I'll come and ask you about it.
hanzi: 如有不明瞭的事，我要來請教你。
poj: Nā ū m̄ chai-iáⁿ ê tāi-chì, góa boeh lâi chhéng-kàu lí.
tl: Nā ū m̄ tsai-iánn ê tāi-tsì, guá bueh lâi tshíng-kàu lí.

english: A person will always be tested by society.
hanzi: 人常常會受到社會的試煉。
poj: Lâng tiāⁿ-tiāⁿ ē siū-tio̍h siā-hōe ê chhì-liān.
tl: Lâng tiānn-tiānn ē siū-tio̍h siā-huē ê tshì-liān.

english: Why don't you go outside and play, inside you only make a mess of the room.
hanzi: 不去外面玩，只再裡面翻東翻西。
poj: M̄ khì gōa-bīn chhit-thô, kan-na tòa lāi-bīn teh chhia-ku-lāng-àng.
tl: M̄ khì guā-bīn tshit-thô, kan-na tuà lāi-bīn teh tshia-ku-lāng-àng.

english: argue with me, dispute with me
Your water is boiling, why don't you go and pick it up.
hanzi: 你的茶開了還不去拿起來。
poj: Lí ê tê chhiāng-chhiāng-kún a, iáu m̄ khì kōaⁿ-khit-lâi.
tl: Lí ê tê tshiāng-tshiāng-kún a, iáu m̄ khì kuānn-khit-lâi.

english: My foot hurts, when I walk I have to limp.
hanzi: 腳痛所以得一拐一拐的。
poj: Kha thiàⁿ só͘-í kiâⁿ-lō͘ tio̍h iōng chhiauh ê.
tl: Kha thiànn sóo-í kiânn-lōo tio̍h iōng tshiauh ê.

english: Don't do your task in a haphazard careless way.
hanzi: 工作不要隨便做，不要馬虎。

english: What do you prefer to eat? Anything, I am not choosy.
hanzi: 你較喜歡吃什麼 ？ 隨便都可以
poj: Lí khah ài chia̍h sím-mih? Chhìn-chhái, chhìn-chhái.
tl: Lí khah ài tsia̍h sím-mih? Tshìn-tshái, tshìn-tshái.

english: Break out in a cold sweat.
cold smile, dry laugh, to smile dryly
dark smoke or flame rises high into the air
clever or talented person, crack player
Don't be mischievous and want to touch everything.
poj: Mài chhiú-jiáu chiān, siūⁿ boeh bong khòaⁿ-bāi-lè.
tl: Mài tshiú-jiáu tsiān, siūnn bueh bong khuànn-bāi-lè.

english: If you think that way, you're all wrong.
hanzi: 你若這樣想，是完全錯誤。
poj: Lí nā siūⁿ án-ni, oân-choân sī chhò-gō͘.
tl: Lí nā siūnn án-ni, uân-tsuân sī tshò-gōo.

english: Today we must hire a few laborers to come and clean the place up.
hanzi: 今天得雇幾個粗工來打掃。
poj: Kin-á-ji̍t ài chhiàⁿ kúi-ê-á chho͘-kang lâi piàⁿ-sàu.
tl: Kin-á-ji̍t ài tshiànn kuí-ê-á tshoo-kang lâi piànn-sàu.

english: If you are going to give someone a gift, is this too cheap?
hanzi: 若要送禮，這種東西會粗俗嗎？
poj: Nā boeh sàng lâng, chit khoán mi̍h-kiāⁿ ē chho͘-sio̍k bē?
tl: Nā bueh sàng lâng, tsit khuán mi̍h-kiānn ē tshoo-sio̍k bē?

english: If you don't know the way, I'll take you there.
hanzi: 你若不知道在那兒，我帶你去。
poj: Lí nā m̄ chai lō͘, góa chhōa lí lâi khì.
tl: Lí nā m̄ tsai lōo, guá tshuā lí lâi khì.

english: a very unexpected visit from a friend (Lit. What wind blew you here today?)
hanzi: 今天是什麼風吹你來的 ？
poj: Kin-á-ji̍t sī sím-mih hong kā lí chhoe lâi ê?
tl: Kin-á-ji̍t sī sím-mih hong kā lí tshue lâi ê?

english: If there is no sun, air it in the wind, and it will dry.
hanzi: 如果沒有陽光晒，晾風也會乾。
poj: Nā bô ji̍t thang pha̍k, chhoe-hong (chhe-hong) iā ē ta.
tl: Nā bô ji̍t thang pha̍k, tshue-hong (tshe-hong) iā ē ta.

english: Don't make a fool out of me.
Don't make fun of the aged.
If you throw banana peels there, you will cause someone to slip and fall.
hanzi: 香蕉皮如丟在那兒，會害人滑倒。
poj: Keng-chio-phôe nā hiat tòa hia, ē hāi lâng chhū poa̍h-tó (chhū-tó, chhū-tó-khì).
tl: King-tsio-phuê nā hiat tuà hia, ē hāi lâng tshū pua̍h-tó (tshū-tó, tshū-tó-khì).

english: urge him to do, press him to pay
Please stick out your tongue and let me take a look at it.
The sight of it makes my mouth water.

poj: Lí chhiú chhun khah tn̂g lè.
tl: Lí tshiú tshun khah tn̂g lè.

english: When you are going out, you must inform your parents.
hanzi: 若要出門，得向父母稟告一聲。
poj: Nā boeh chhut-mn̂g, tio̍h kā pē-bó chhûn chi̍t ē (tio̍h chun-chhûn pē-bú).
tl: Nā bueh tshut-mn̂g, tio̍h kā pē-bó tshûn tsi̍t ē (tio̍h tsun-tshûn pē-bú).

english: Do you know the size of your clothes?
hanzi: 你知道你衣服的尺寸嗎？
poj: Lí chai-iáⁿ lí ê saⁿ-khò͘ ê chhùn-chhioh bô͘?
tl: Lí tsai-iánn lí ê sann-khòo ê tshùn-tshioh bôo?

english: The king said, "Whatsoever you wish, speak out."
hanzi: 國王說: 你要什麼 ？ 隨便你說。
poj: Kok-ông kóng, "Lí boeh ài sím-mih chhut-chāi lí (iû-chāi lí) kóng.
tl: Kok-ông kóng, "Lí bueh ài sím-mih tshut-tsāi lí (iû-tsāi lí) kóng.

english: How much money will you contribute?
Don't take your spite out on me.
You are going to Hong Kong, when are you starting out?
poj: Lí boeh khì Hiong-káng, tang-sî boeh chhut-hoat?
tl: Lí bueh khì Hiong-káng, tang-sî bueh tshut-huat?

english: If there is a vacancy, I will let you know.
poj: Nā chhut-khoat góa chiah kā lí thong-ti.
tl: Nā tshut-khuat guá tsiah kā lí thong-ti.

english: If you do evil, it will leak out sooner or later.
hanzi: 你要是做壞事，早晚會洩漏。
poj: Lí nā chò pháiⁿ, chá-bān ē chhut-phòa.
tl: Lí nā tsò pháinn, tsá-bān ē tshut-phuà.

english: Will you attend the meeting or class?
The problem cannot be settled, unless you make an appearance.
hanzi: 你要是不出面，事情不能解決。
poj: Lí nā bô chhut-thâu (chhut-bīn), tāi-chì bē kái-koat.
tl: Lí nā bô tshut-thâu (tshut-bīn), tāi-tsì bē kái-kuat.

english: Did you have your supper yet?
No need to worry about one's food and clothing.
If you are willing to endure hardships you will succeed.

poj: Lí tī toh-ūi teh chia̍h thâu-lō͘?
tl: Lí tī toh-uī teh tsia̍h thâu-lōo?

english: If you are too naughty, I'll lock you up in the toilet.
hanzi: 你假如頑皮，要把你關在廁所。
poj: Lí nā siuⁿ chiān, boeh kā lí koaiⁿ tòa piān-só͘.
tl: Lí nā siunn tsiān, bueh kā lí kuainn tuà piān-sóo.

english: How come you are so naughty?

hanzi: 不要接近壞人，不要跟壞人接近。
poj: M̄-thang chiap-kīn pháiⁿ-lâng. Mài kap pháiⁿ-lâng chiap-kīn.
tl: M̄-thang tsiap-kīn pháinn-lâng. Mài kap pháinn-lâng tsiap-kīn.

english: Don't choose only good ones, you must take good ones and bad ones together.
hanzi: 不可揀好的，好壞要公允分配。
poj: M̄-thang kéng hó ê, hó pháiⁿ tio̍h-ài chiàu-kah.
tl: M̄-thang kíng hó ê, hó pháinn tio̍h-ài tsiàu-kah.

english: Not all the students are present today
Let's keep watch at night by turns.
Your face is so dirty, I don't dare kiss you.
hanzi: 你的臉這麼髒，我不敢吻你。
poj: Lí ê bīn chiah-ni̍h lah-sap, góa m̄-káⁿ kā lí chim.
tl: Lí ê bīn tsiah-ni̍h lah-sap, guá m̄-kánn kā lí tsim.

english: You are here on a rare visit today, did the wind blow you in?
hanzi: 今天真是稀客，是風吹你來的吧！
poj: Lí kín-ná-ji̍t chin hán-kiâⁿ, sī hong kā lí chhoe-lâi ê, sī bô͘?
tl: Lí kín-ná-ji̍t tsin hán-kiânn, sī hong kā lí tshue-lâi ê, sī bôo?

english: How are you getting along with your work?
The truth will be out some day.
poj: Koh bô lōa kú, chin-siòng chiū ē chai-iáⁿ.
tl: Koh bô luā kú, tsin-siòng tsiū ē tsai-iánn.

english: Call for me on your way to the park.
hanzi: 你要去公園的時候來邀我。
poj: Lí boeh khì kong-hn̂g ê sî lâi chio góa.
tl: Lí bueh khì kong-hn̂g ê sî lâi tsio guá.

english: Don't invite him to go to the movies.
poj: M̄-thang chio i khì khòaⁿ tiān-iáⁿ.
tl: M̄-thang tsio i khì khuànn tiān-iánn.

english: Do you have money? Very much of it.
poj: Lí ū chîⁿ bô͘? Chió-khoeh (Chió-kheh góa ê chîⁿ).
tl: Lí ū tsînn bôo? Tsió-khueh (Tsió-kheh guá ê tsînn).

english: Don't laugh at me, there are quite a few who are henpecked.
hanzi: 不要笑我，怕太太的人多的是。
poj: Mài chhiò góa, chió-kheh lâng kiaⁿ bó͘.
tl: Mài tshiò guá, tsió-kheh lâng kiann bóo.

english: Your face is very dirty, take a look in the mirror.
hanzi: 你的臉很髒，去照鏡子看看。
poj: Lí ê bīn chin lah-sap, khì chiò-kiàⁿ khòaⁿ-bāi-lè.
tl: Lí ê bīn tsin lah-sap, khì tsiò-kiànn khuànn-bāi-lè.

english: to get gall or kidney stones
have had a thoroughly good sleep

poj: M̄-thang chiong góa ê chheh the̍h khì (M̄-thang the̍h góa ê chheh khì.)
tl: M̄-thang tsiong guá ê tsheh the̍h khì (M̄-thang the̍h guá ê tsheh khì.)

english: As soon as their father died, the children all wailed very loudly.
hanzi: 爸爸一過世，孩子就大聲哭。
poj: Lāu-pē chi̍t-ē sí-khì, kiáⁿ chiū tōa siaⁿ khàu.
tl: Lāu-pē tsi̍t-ē sí-khì, kiánn tsiū tuā siann khàu.

english: To meet him wouldn't hurt anything.
poj: Kìⁿ chi̍t ê bīn mā hó.
tl: Kìnn tsi̍t ê bīn mā hó.

english: If the weather is good I am going.
If you drink rather strong coffee you will not be sleepy.
hanzi: 喝較濃的咖啡就不想睡。
poj: Lim khah kāu ê ka-pi chiū bē ài khùn.
tl: Lim khah kāu ê ka-pi tsiū bē ài khùn.

english: If there is no God, then there is no heaven or earth or anything.
hanzi: 要是沒有天主，就沒有天地萬物。
poj: Nā bô Thian-Chú, chiū bô thiⁿ-tē bān-bu̍t.
tl: Nā bô Thian-Tsú, tsiū bô thinn-tē bān-bu̍t.

english: Don't swear without a good reason.

poj: m̄ chiūⁿ chi̍t goe̍h ji̍t (chi̍t kó͘ goe̍h)
tl: m̄ tsiūnn tsi̍t gue̍h ji̍t (tsi̍t kóo gue̍h)

english: The cat licked the dish clean.
poj: Niau-á chiong pôaⁿ-á chn̄g kah chin chheng-khì.
tl: Niau-á tsiong puânn-á tsn̄g kah tsin tshing-khì.

english: If you don't know the way, I will lead the way.
hanzi: 你們要是不知道在那兒，我來帶路。
poj: Lín nā m̄-chai lō͘, góa chò-chêng.
tl: Lín nā m̄-tsai lōo, guá tsò-tsîng.

english: No one has come to be the marriage broker.
You ten priests came all at once, I have no chairs for you to sit on.
hanzi: 你們十位神父一齊來，我沒有椅子讓你們坐。
poj: Lín cha̍p ūi sîn-hū chò chi̍t-ē lâi, góa bô í-á thang hō͘ lín chē.
tl: Lín tsa̍p uī sîn-hū tsò tsi̍t-ē lâi, guá bô í-á thang hōo lín tsē.

english: People say that the shape of that home doesn't look good.
hanzi: 有人嫌那間房子的造型不好看。
poj: Lâng hiâm hit keng chhù ê chō-hêng bô hó khòaⁿ.
tl: Lâng hiâm hit king tshù ê tsō-hîng bô hó khuànn.

english: If someone helps, we'll certainly win.
hanzi: 如果有人助力，我們一定會贏。
poj: Nā ū lâng chō͘-la̍t, lán it-tēng ē iâⁿ.
tl: Nā ū lâng tsōo-la̍t, lán it-tīng ē iânn.

english: Relief goods may not be resold.

hanzi: 瑪利諾會館轉交林先生。

english: The Complete Volume of Six Laws - an omnibus of modern Chinese laws
Keep on do it, don't give up.

hanzi: 你最好靜一些，你少插嘴。

english: You will get yourself into trouble by learning to take morphine.
hanzi: 你學吃嗎啡，明明是在作繭自縛。
poj: Lí o̍h chia̍h mô͘-hui, bêng-bêng sī teh chok-kián chū-pa̍k.
tl: Lí o̍h tsia̍h môo-hui, bîng-bîng sī teh tsok-kián tsū-pa̍k.

english: My section he also wants to annex.
hanzi: 連我的份，他也想要全吞。
poj: Liân góa ê gia̍h, i iā siūⁿ-boeh chóng-thun.
tl: Liân guá ê gia̍h, i iā siūnn-bueh tsóng-thun.

english: Is it possible that you get all of it?
free to act as we please
If you know that you have done wrong you should surrender to the authorities
hanzi: 你要是知道做錯了，就得去自首。
poj: Lí nā chai-iáⁿ chò m̄-tio̍h, ài khì chū-siú.
tl: Lí nā tsai-iánn tsò m̄-tio̍h, ài khì tsū-siú.

english: You have a bright future before you Take good care of yourself.
hanzi: 你是個有前途的人，自重點。
poj: Lí sī chiân-tô͘ iú-bōng ê lâng, khah chū-tiōng lè.
tl: Lí sī tsiân-tôo iú-bōng ê lâng, khah tsū-tiōng lè.

english: Don't beat down (the price) any more.
Do not put me under the false charge of stealing other people's wells.  Don't accuse me of doing something which is impossible.
poj: M̄-thang lōa góa thau giâ kó͘-chéⁿ.
tl: M̄-thang luā guá thau giâ kóo-tsénn.

english: pay the water bill, to urinate
Don't come looking for him, you always get him into trouble, you never do anything good.
hanzi: 你們不用來找他，都是一些壞事，不會有好事。
poj: Lín mài chio i, choân chi̍t kóa chúi-kúi kiò pái-sūi, bô hó-tāi.
tl: Lín mài tsio i, tsuân tsi̍t kuá tsuí-kuí kiò pái-suī, bô hó-tāi.

english: revere the aged and honor the wise
wipe or brush too roughly, write or paint hastily
Do you think it will rain today?
poj: Lí khòaⁿ, kin-ná-ji̍t ē lo̍h-hō͘ bē?
tl: Lí khuànn, kin-ná-ji̍t ē lo̍h-hōo bē?

english: It would sound better to say it in this way.
hanzi: 如果這樣講，會好聽一點.
poj: Nā án-ni kóng, ē khah hó thiaⁿ.
tl: Nā án-ni kóng, ē khah hó thiann.

english: If you eat any old thing you will get the runs.
poj: Lí nā lām-sám chia̍h, ē làu-sái.
tl: Lí nā lām-sám tsia̍h, ē làu-sái.

english: Cats catch rats, dogs watch the door.
poj: Niau ē kā niáu-chhí, káu ē kò͘ mn̂g.
tl: Niau ē kā niáu-tshí, káu ē kòo mn̂g.

english: Can you (Do you know how to) drive a car?
seize by the waist so as to throw an opponent down
If you send shorty to get it, is it possible he'll he be able to reach it?
hanzi: 你叫那個很矮的去，拿得到嗎？
poj: Lí kiò hit ê é-tuh-tuh ê khì kám the̍h ē-tio̍h?
tl: Lí kiò hit ê é-tuh-tuh ê khì kám the̍h ē-tio̍h?

english: What advantage will it be to do so?
hanzi: 你這樣做，有什麼益處（好處）？
poj: Lí án-ne chò, ū sím-mih ek-chhù (hó-chhù)?
tl: Lí án-ne tsò, ū sím-mih ik-tshù (hó-tshù)?

english: You must do it this way
This room is all dirty and dusty, what are you doing coming in here?
hanzi: 整間灰塵滿天飛，你進來這裡要做什麼？
poj: Kui keng eng-phōng-phōng, lí ji̍p-lâi chia boeh chhòng siaⁿh?
tl: Kui king ing-phōng-phōng, lí ji̍p-lâi tsia bueh tshòng siannh?

english: be guided by the turn of events, adapt oneself to circumstance (of the moment)
Don't meddle in the affairs of others.
cancer fatal to the world of education
Don't tread on it, you must jump over it.
poj: M-thang ta̍h kòe-khì, tio̍h hāⁿ kòe-khì.
tl: M-thang ta̍h kuè-khì, tio̍h hānn kuè-khì.

english: If you don't give me your address, where will I start looking for you.
hanzi: 你也沒有住址給我，你要叫我去那兒海底摸針？
poj: Lí iā bô chū-chí hō͘ góa, lí boeh kiò góa toh-ūi khì hái bong chiam?
tl: Lí iā bô tsū-tsí hōo guá, lí bueh kiò guá toh-uī khì hái bong tsiam?

english: Would you send me to find a needle in the sea?
hanzi: 你要叫我去海底撈針嗎？
poj: Lí boeh kiò góa khì hái-té bong chiam, sī bô?
tl: Lí bueh kiò guá khì hái-té bong tsiam, sī bô?

english: If you ask someone about their kids they give you a sigh.
hanzi: 一講到他兒子，每人都搖頭。
poj: Nā kóng-tio̍h in kiáⁿ, tāi-ke to hàiⁿ-thâu.
tl: Nā kóng-tio̍h in kiánn, tāi-ke to hàinn-thâu.

english: How many grade levels does your school have?
talk at random, not come to the point, be unreliable
It is rumored that he is dead.
poj: Lâng teh hán kóng i sí khì a.
tl: Lâng teh hán kóng i sí khì a.

english: There is no limit to human progress.
My finger got pinched between the rocks.
Good medicine is bitter, faithful words offend the ear.

hanzi: 如著了涼，百日咳又會發作。
poj: Nā kôaⁿ-tio̍h, he-ku-sàu ē koh giâ khí-lâi.
tl: Nā kuânn-tio̍h, he-ku-sàu ē koh giâ khí-lâi.

english: Everyone says that a strict teacher will produce good students.
When people are fighting, if possible you should try to pull them apart.
hanzi: 別人在吵架時，你如果有辦法就把他們拉開。
poj: Lâng teh oan-ke ê sî, lí nā ū hoat-tō͘ chiū kā in giú-khui.
tl: Lâng teh uan-ke ê sî, lí nā ū huat-tōo tsiū kā in giú-khui.

english: If you are not careful, you'll "loose your soul" (send your life to the wrong place).
hanzi: 如果不注意，會誤送生命。
poj: Nā bô chù-ì, ē gō͘-sàng sèⁿ-miā.
tl: Nā bô tsù-ì, ē gōo-sàng sènn-miā.

english: Can looking only at externals be accurate?
poj: Kan-na khòaⁿ gōa-chāi kám ē chún?
tl: Kan-na khuànn guā-tsāi kám ē tsún?

english: Will you dare to face him or it? Will you dare attempt it?
hanzi: 你敢惹他嗎？ 你敢嘗試嗎？
poj: Lí káⁿ khì ha i, sī bô͘?
tl: Lí kánn khì ha i, sī bôo?

english: Contact with vermilion makes one red, with ink makes one black.
poj: Kīn chu-chià chhek, kīn be̍k-chià hek.
tl: Kīn tsu-tsià tshik, kīn bi̍k-tsià hik.

english: The fate of the country depends upon…
If you have no objections to a poor place, come back for a visit.
hanzi: 你要是不嫌棄地方不好，請再來玩。
poj: Lí nā bô hiâm pháiⁿ só͘-chāi, chiah koh lâi chhit-thô.
tl: Lí nā bô hiâm pháinn sóo-tsāi, tsiah koh lâi tshit-thô.

english: If you are exposed to the sunshine for a long time, your skin will peel.
hanzi: 要是曬太陽曬太久，臉會脫皮。
poj: Nā pha̍k-ji̍t pha̍k siuⁿ kú, bīn ē hiauh-khak.
tl: Nā pha̍k-ji̍t pha̍k siunn kú, bīn ē hiauh-khak.

english: Let's go up the mountain and enjoy the moon.
poj: Lán lâi khì soaⁿ-téng him-sióng goe̍h-niû.
tl: Lán lâi khì suann-tíng him-sióng gue̍h-niû.

english: dizziness, be dizzy or giddy, swimming head
Even if I have a bigger set back I won't regret it.
poj: Koh-khah sit-pāi góa mā bē hiō-hóe.
tl: Koh-khah sit-pāi guá mā bē hiō-hué.

english: complain about hardships loudly, broadcast one's grievances
In cold weather chickens roost or return to the nest earlier.
How come you are so truculent?
poj: Lí ná chiah-ni̍h hiong? (Lí ná chiah-ni̍h pháiⁿ?)
tl: Lí ná tsiah-ni̍h hiong? (Lí ná tsiah-ni̍h pháinn?)

english: I don't know where I went to antagonize so vicious an evil spirit that causes this much ill health.
hanzi: 不知沖犯到那個地方的凶神惡煞會那麼厲害。
poj: M̄-chai khì chhiong-hoān-tio̍h toh chi̍t tē-hng ê hiong-sîn ok-soah ē hiah lī-hāi.
tl: M̄-tsai khì tshiong-huān-tio̍h toh tsi̍t tē-hng ê hiong-sîn ok-suah ē hiah lī-hāi.

english: cannot tell the difference between good and bad, do not know right from wrong
What business is it of yours? What has it got to do with you?
Why bother to go that far for a dinner invitation?
poj: Khì kah hiah hn̄g hō͘ lâng chhiáⁿ, ná tio̍h hiah-ni̍h hô-mih-khó͘?
tl: Khì kah hiah hn̄g hōo lâng tshiánn, ná tio̍h hiah-ni̍h hô-mih-khóo?

english: If you play on the street, you'll be run over by a car.
hanzi: 要是在馬路上玩，會被車子輾到。
poj: Nā tòa tōa-lō͘ chhit-thô, ē hō͘ khì-chhia kauh-tio̍h.
tl: Nā tuà tuā-lōo tshit-thô, ē hōo khì-tshia kauh-tio̍h.

english: The matchmaker is very eloquent. Be careful not to be cheated.
hanzi: 媒人婆能言善道，你得注意點，不要被騙。
poj: Môe-lâng-chhùi hô͘-lùi-lùi, lí tio̍h khah sè-jī le, m̄-thang khì hō͘ phiàn-khì.
tl: Muê-lâng-tshuì hôo-luì-luì, lí tio̍h khah sè-jī le, m̄-thang khì hōo phiàn-khì.

english: If the difficulty with a sworn enemy is not quickly resolved it will keep getting worse as time goes on.
hanzi: 冤仇如不趕緊化解，會越結越深。
poj: Oan-siû nā bô kín hòa-kái, ē lú kiat lú chhim.
tl: Uan-siû nā bô kín huà-kái, ē lú kiat lú tshim.

poj: Lí ê hoān lí ê, góa ê hoān góa ê pau khí-lâi.
tl: Lí ê huān lí ê, guá ê huān guá ê pau khí-lâi.

english: You go your way, and I'll go mine.
poj: Lí hoān lí kiâⁿ, góa hoān góa kiâⁿ.
tl: Lí huān lí kiânn, guá huān guá kiânn.

poj: Lí ū boeh hoan-hù sím-mih bô?
tl: Lí ū bueh huan-hù sím-mih bô?

english: Mother ordered me to wash the dishes
poj: Má-ma hoan-hù góa tio̍h sé óaⁿ-pôaⁿ.
tl: Má-ma huan-hù guá tio̍h sé uánn-puânn.

english: letter addressed to Mr. Li c/o Maryknoll House, in care of the Maryknoll House
hanzi: 瑪利諾會館轉交李先生

english: You are very fickle, how can I believe what you say.
hanzi: 你說話反覆無常，我怎敢相信？
poj: Lí kóng-ōe hoán-khí-hoán-tó, góa ná káⁿ siong-sìn.
tl: Lí kóng-uē huán-khí-huán-tó, guá ná kánn siong-sìn.

english: If you talk to that kind of unreasonable person how can you make any sense.
hanzi: 跟那種不通情理的人說，怎麼說得通？
poj: Kap hit khoán hoan-kī-kā ê lâng kóng, ná kóng ē chhun-chhiaⁿ?
tl: Kap hit khuán huan-kī-kā ê lâng kóng, ná kóng ē tshun-tshiann?

english: If things are damp they will get so moldy they will begin to stink and turn green.
hanzi: 東西如果潮濕，就會長霉發味。
poj: Mi̍h-kiāⁿ nā hoán-lùn chiū ē seⁿ-ko͘ kah chhàu-phú.
tl: Mi̍h-kiānn nā huán-lùn tsiū ē senn-koo kah tshàu-phú.

english: old person forgetful because of age
have a large circle of acquaintance
military caste, clan or clique, military people, militarists
Many people who have come here have risen to power and fortune.
hanzi: 來這地方發跡的人很多。
poj: Lâi chit tē-hng hoat-jiah ê lâng chin chē.
tl: Lâi tsit tē-hng huat-jiah ê lâng tsin tsē.

english: The scooter won't start because the sparkplugs are probably bad.
hanzi: 摩托車沒辦法發動，大概是火星塞壞了。
poj: O͘-thó͘-bái bē hoat, tāi-khài sī hóe-chhùi-á hāi-khì.
tl: Oo-thóo-bái bē huat, tāi-khài sī hué-tshuì-á hāi-khì.

english: hold a meeting, conference or council
raise the dead to life (said of curing a man almost dying)
Come see me before you are driven into a corner.
hanzi: 不要等到火燒眉頭，才要來找我。
poj: M̄-thang thèng-hāu kàu hóe sio ba̍k-bâi, chiah boeh lâi chhōe góa.
tl: M̄-thang thìng-hāu kàu hué sio ba̍k-bâi, tsiah bueh lâi tshuē guá.

english: cut one's way through the enemy
What line of business are you in?
poj: Lí chò toh chi̍t hong-bīn ê sū-gia̍p?
tl: Lí tsò toh tsi̍t hong-bīn ê sū-gia̍p?

english: We shall have a good harvest this year.
If is should fail, you must bear the responsibility
be inconsistent with the fact, contradictory to the truth
You stand at the fork in the road between Heaven and Hell.
hanzi: 你站在天堂和地獄的岔路上。
poj: Lí khiā tī Thian-tông kah tē-ga̍k ê hun-chhe-lō͘.
tl: Lí khiā tī Thian-tông kah tē-ga̍k ê hun-tshe-lōo.

english: You must draw a sharp line between public and private affairs
I shall be at home on and after Sept. 1st.
hanzi: 九月初一以後我在家裏。
poj: Káu-goe̍h chhe-it í-āu góa ū tī chhù-ni̍h.
tl: Káu-gue̍h tshe-it í-āu guá ū tī tshù-ni̍h.

english: How much did you budget to build your house?
hanzi: 你預算多少錢要蓋房子？
poj: Lí ī-soàn lōa-chē chîⁿ boeh khí-chhù?
tl: Lí ī-suàn luā-tsē tsînn bueh khí-tshù?

english: Formerly oxcarts made a squeaky noise.
hanzi: 以前的牛車走起來吱吱叫。

english: Still there is reason in what you say.
poj: Lí só͘ kóng ê iā ū tō-lí.
tl: Lí sóo kóng ê iā ū tō-lí.

english: Even a little child knows it.
Your older brother is diligent, while you are so lazy.
hanzi: 你哥哥那麼勤勞，然而你卻這麼懶惰。
poj: Lín a-hiaⁿ hiah kut-la̍t, iah lí chiah pīn-tōaⁿ.
tl: Lín a-hiann hiah kut-la̍t, iah lí tsiah pīn-tuānn.

english: You may go out to play, but you must come back earlier.
hanzi: 你可以出去玩，可是要早點回來。
poj: Lí thang chhut-khì chhit-thô, iah tio̍h khah chá tńg-lâi le.
tl: Lí thang tshut-khì tshit-thô, iah tio̍h khah tsá tńg-lâi le.

english: I hope we shall meet again.
poj: Nā ū iân chiah koh sio-kìⁿ.
tl: Nā ū iân tsiah koh sio-kìnn.

english: The meeting was adjourned (postponed) until Saturday next.
look until our eyes grow dim
break off the opium or tobacco habit
conceal behind the back or in one's clothing
When someone invites with good intentions, how can it not be bad manners not to go?
hanzi: 別人好意邀請，不去怎麼好意思？
poj: Lâng hó-ì iau-chhiáⁿ, bô khì kám bē pháiⁿ-sè?
